Ploy CLI v2

Usage:
  ploy <command> [<args>]

Core Commands:
  mod              Plan and run Mods workflows
  mods             Observe Mods execution (logs, events)
  runs             Inspect and follow individual runs
  upload           Upload artifact bundle to a run (HTTPS)
  cluster          Manage clusters (deploy, nodes, rollout, tokens)
  config           Inspect or update cluster configuration
  manifest         Inspect and validate integration manifests
  node             Manage worker nodes
  rollout          Rolling updates for servers and nodes
  token            Manage API tokens for authentication

Use 'ploy help <command>' for detailed command help.
